text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we walk along the river on our way back, I
think of the puppy that Air Groove ended up
taking home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I decide to ask her about how the dog is doing.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes. I received special permission to allow the
pup to stay in my dorm room. The dorm mistress
helps out when I'm not around.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I have to say, she's very smart. She learns quickly,
and I don't need to correct any bad behavior
more than once.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, you could learn a thing or two from her,
hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove emanates an aura of positivity and
kindness as she brags about her puppy.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm heading out to buy some dog food and treats
now. Care to join me?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, Air Groove! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, here already, Taiki? Strange to see you
actually show up on time for once.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! Leave the puppy biz to me! If you're
the mama, then I'll be the papa!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Where in the world did this mama and papa stuff
come from?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I have to deal with this ridiculous rigmarole
from my roommate every day as well... I'm sick of
it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now, hold on just a minute! Are you sayin' Fine is
tryin' to cut in on my job as papa?! Grrr, I'm not
gonna take that sittin' down!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Enough, enough... I'm starting to feel a headache
coming on. Let's go—pet supplies are this way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of us head to the pet supply section,
and Air Groove stops in front of a shelf of dog
toys.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Taiki. A crumb of your wisdom, if you
wouldn't mind.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! I knew every sheepdog back on the
ranch like they were my very own family! Fire
away, pardner!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'd like you to speak up if you think of
anything, as well. Now, let's commence the toy
selection process!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaw, let's get to it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Air Grooooove? Check out this
super-duper-jumbo-size bone!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's larger than the dog! No—absolutely not!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The toy selection is off to what I think is
supposed to be a good start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Air Groove buys a small rubber ball
that can hold a treat inside.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're really gonna pass on that big ball? Ngh,
what a cryin' shame...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Taiki... What is with this unfathomable trust you
place in large things? I swear...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All the same, it's been... educational... having you
here. You have my thanks.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, Air Groove! You're callin' it quits
already?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Look at all the yummy doggy treats! They've got
jerky, biscuits, cake—the whole enchilada! Let's
get 'em all!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I suppose treats can be a useful tool to get a
puppy's attention...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But I'm only taking care of her for a short while. I
can't foster too close a relationship...
choice_data_list: Everyone needs a reward now and then.
Woof woof! Won'tcha feed a poor pup?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeah, nice assist! I knew you were a good'un!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Loosen up, Air Groove. Do ya care about the
pupper, or don'tcha?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
With a treat or three, we'll have a happy puppy
before long! And a happy pup makes you a happy
duck!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What an awful tag team you two make...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Fine. Every now and then won't hurt. I'll buy some.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove acquiesces with a shrewd smile and
buys some doggy treats.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me? For your own sake, I hope that wasn't
an impression of our little friend.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you've done it now! Hold it right there, and
I'll show you at length just how far your feeble
imitation falls from the mark!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa there, Air Groove! Calm your jets!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, a cute pupster deserves a treat now and
then! It's the recipe for even greater cuteness!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hrm...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Let me paint a picture for you, Air Groove.
You've got the dog biscuit in hand, and the pup
dashes towards ya, all barks and wags! Woof,
woof, wahoo!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Fine. But just so we're clear, I'm not doing this
because of your silly charade, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm just... bowing to Taiki's greater experience in
raising dogs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, Air Groove goes home with some
dog treats in her bag.
